## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `fix!:`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactoring (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Performance improvement (`perf:`)
- [ ] Tests (`test:`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`ci:`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have run `make pre-commit-run` locally without errors
- [ ] I have run `make api-tests` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have added / updated tests for any new behaviour
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary
